item.title: Pixie & Brutus x Litterbox Crossover #1 (#2 tomorrow!)
item.description:
The animated pilot is funded (THANK YOU!) but animation is very expensive, so we've lined up a bunch of exclusive rewards that will only be available by backing! Check them out here: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/litterboxanimation/pilot-episode?ref=f52qpp
BONUS Panel! Big thanks to Ben for doing these collabs with me! They're always so fun! Be sure to follow him at https://www.instagram.com/pet_foolery/ for more brilliant comics! NEW crossover TOMORROW!
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: Video dump 2

item.title: D'Pharaoh Woon-A-Tai (Reservation Dogs) attended the Emmys with a red handprint, showing solidarity for Missing and Murdered Indigenous Women
item.description:
The young Canadian actor (of Oji-Cree descent) is the first Indigenous actor to recieve the nomination for Best Actor in a Comedy. EDIT: And apparently a bunch of racists got pissed off at me pointing out how a white actor in a series that isn't a Comedy took the award instead of D'Pharaoh and several other actors of color in ACTUAL comedy series.
The Red Hand has been an important symbol for the Missing and Murdered Indigenous Women Movement for years. From Native Hope's Website https://www.nativehope.org/missing-and-murdered-indigenous-women-mmiw "A red hand over the mouth has become the symbol of a growing movement, the MMIW movement. It stands for all the missing sisters whose voices are not heard. It stands for the silence of the media and law enforcement in the midst of this crisis. It stands for the oppression and subjugation of Native women who are now rising up to say # NoMoreStolenSisters." There is also the more general Missing and Murdered Indigenous People awareness movement, as this is a problem across all demographics in Indiginous communities, though women and girls are by far the most affected cohort.
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: My beautiful girl Delta, 14, took her final nap this weekend. I just want to share the joy she brought to my life.
item.description: From 8-14, she gave me the best 6 years I could have ever asked for.
item.dc:creator: GamenationFilms

item.title: Images of Note: Eating rocks and cement
item.description:
cronch
If you know the history of Mario this is even funnier.
Terrifying is something I would call a furby.
Listen, if you are under 18, maybe you should find out where your mum's phone is and call the police because Stallman has...opinions...about Epistein and other things. Seriously, look it up.
OxO
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
D:
You can tell Smithers was not into it
MORE ARCH SLANDER TIME OwO
D':
Brb listening to 500 stab wounds.
AAAAAAAAAAAA
0w0
yoink
:)
Bob votes Republican, but thinks they are "too liberal" and wants to see shit that would make the Congo Free State look like Shangri-la.
YATTA!
SOMETHING!
AAAAAAAAAAAA
weeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
oh no
proot owo
How the fuck is Microsoft getting away with Recall? Like seriously. You can't remove it, or turn it off, it's only encrypted when you log out and it takes up a massive amount of ram. It's going to be a security disaster.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Just so you know
item.description: The battle of Puebla is something that we don't really care about, but we celebrate our Independece from Spain the 15th of September. Today is a big day for Mexico.
